base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of wizzrobe_teleport_shoot — a character from 1986 legend of zelda. Wizzrobe — robed caster. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Wizzrobe — robed caster; 4-frame teleport-appear-shoot-disappear cycle; fires magic projectile. Red (orange) = non-teleporting-walker variant, Blue = teleport variant
